purpose: Run the autonomous dry-run chain from task text to final safe-stop/readiness report without mutating source, registry, data, Cloudflare, git, or deploy state.
hard_rules: The orchestrator must not execute mutation, repair, registry write, git push, deploy, or Cloudflare mutation.
The orchestrator follows policy/report outputs, not hardcoded resource names.
Unknown or future branches safe-stop into review/triage.
Ready means ready for a later controlled context, not real apply now.
